SELECT kurtSamp(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM series_with_value_column WHERE value > 0);
SELECT kurtSamp(value) FROM series_a UNION SELECT kurtSamp(value) FROM series_b;
SELECT kurtSamp(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM (SELECT value FROM series_with_value_column WHERE value < 10) LIMIT 10) AS limited;
SELECT kurtSamp(value) FROM series_with_value_column GROUP BY value HAVING value > 1;
